text:
Exciting news from Adara Ventures!

We're proud to announce a pioneering partnership with NVIDIA to accelerate AI adoption in Europe. This collaboration, through NVIDIA's Inception program, marks the first of its kind between the tech giant and a European VC firm.

Our portfolio startups will benefit from up to 70% discounts on NVIDIA technology, specialized AI training, and direct support from NVIDIA engineers. This alliance not only enhances our capabilities but also reinforces our commitment to supporting deeptech innovation.

 Read more about this partnership in Expansión: https://lnkd.in/dNpEapzC
author: Rocio Pillado

text:
🚀 We’re proud to share that Adara Ventures is the first European VC to join the NVIDIA Inception VC Alliance.

This strategic partnership deepens our founders’ access to the NVIDIA ecosystem — from cutting-edge technology and talent to global go-to-market support.

We’re already seeing meaningful benefits across our portfolio, and this is just the beginning.

🤝 We believe collaboration is key to building a stronger European tech ecosystem.

We look forward to more funds joining the Alliance, which will unlock even more opportunities for deep tech founders across the continent.
author: Ross Strachan

text:
We're excited to announce our investment in airflows, a platform that turns AI into deterministic, auditable software systems for the enterprise. Adara Ventures led the €2M round, with participation from Armilar.

Gen AI has made it easier than ever to prototype software, but turning those prototypes into production-grade systems remains the biggest challenge. Organisations need speed, but they also need governance, auditability, and operational reliability.

airflows was built to close this gap. Its DSL engine acts as the application's single source of truth—versionable, auditable, and fully controllable—while an AI copilot accelerates development and a deterministic execution layer ensures predictable outcomes. The result: AI that is not just assistive, but operational.

The next chapter starts here for a team we know and trust. We're backing Antonio Lillo, Eduardo Rivas, Paco Hernández, Ignacio Cabrera, and Julio Casal again—with deep enterprise roots across AlienVault, Constella Intelligence, StratioBD, and Paradigma Digital—as they bring deterministic AI to enterprise production.

👉 Learn more: https://lnkd.in/eht_BjBM
author: Adara Ventures

text:
Adara Ventures, the Madrid-based VC firm specialising in early-stage DeepTech investments, today announced the first close of its fourth flagship fund, AV4, targeting €100 million in capital commitments 🇪🇸 🚀 

This new fund reinforces Adara’s commitment to delivering strong returns in strategic sectors, including cybersecurity, applied AI, digital infrastructure, hardware components, digital health, and space.

“We are immensely proud to announce the successful first close of AV4,” said Nico Goulet, Founding Partner of Adara Ventures. “Over the past nine months, we have secured in excess of €140 million in commitments across our fourth-generation funds. Alongside AV4, this includes Adara Ventures Energy (AVE), our first Pan-European fund dedicated to energy transition technologies. In one of the most challenging fundraising environments of the past 20 years, our strong DPI record, disciplined investment strategy, and focused fund model make AV4 a compelling opportunity for our limited partners.”

https://lnkd.in/dFVcJwfp

text:
🚀 Big News: We are proud to announce that Adara Ventures has officially joined the NVIDIA Inception VC Alliance. 

🗨️ "Being selected by NVIDIA is a testament to 20 years of supporting visionary startups shaping the future of technology,” said Alberto Echeverri, Partner at Adara Ventures. 

By joining the VC Alliance, we’re working to accelerate #AI adoption, especially in the #Energy sector, and opening new doors for our portfolio companies. 

At Adara, we remain committed to backing the #deeptech pioneers solving the world’s hardest problems — and now, we do so with the power of NVIDIA behind us. 💫

text:
📢 We’re pleased to announce that Adara Ventures has led Kimera Technologies’ latest €2M+ seed funding round, deepening our partnership with the company as it enters its next phase of growth.

🔍 Kimera is redefining eCommerce search with a multimodal #AI engine that combines natural language understanding, computer vision, and conversational intelligence. It enables shoppers to find products as intuitively as speaking with a sales assistant and helps retailers significantly improve the customer experience and conversions. 🛒 

🌎 Having supported Kimera since its earliest stages, we’re proud to continue backing the team as they accelerate the rollout of their conversational search engine and expand into new international markets.

We look forward to working closely with Álvaro Igual Campos, Carles Igual Bañó, Luis Llusiá Morgan, and the entire Kimera team as they continue bringing more conversational, intelligent search solutions to eCommerce businesses worldwide. 🚀

Learn more: https://lnkd.in/e_yHc9b8
author: Adara Ventures

text:
💫 As we wrap up the first half of 2025, we wanted to reflect on key moments from the past few months: celebrating new investments, team promotions, and impressive growth stories from our across portfolio.

🚀 We announced the successful first close of our fourth flagship fund AV4 with a target of €100M in capital commitments, and our first investments of AV4 in TuringDream 🇪🇸  and TandemTrace 🇪🇸 .

🌱 We hosted our 3rd meeting of the Industrial Advisory Committee for Adara Ventures Energy and announced our two latest investments, in Corinex 🇨🇦 & Wirescan AS 🇳🇴. 

🤝 We proudly announced our acceptance into the NVIDIA Inception VC Alliance, as the first European VC to join.

🎉 We held our Investor Conference 2025 and celebrated the 20 Year Anniversary of Adara Ventures. 

Continue reading 👉 https://lnkd.in/dpNaAE8i

As we head into the second half of the year, we’re filled with optimism and excitement for what lies ahead. So stay tuned — there’s so much more to come! 

Have a great summer! ☀️
author: Adara Ventures

text:
📢 We’re excited to announce our investment in AppFactor, a platform enabling a new generation of self-healing enterprise software.

Adara Ventures co-led AppFactor’s €4m Seed round, alongside Tensor Ventures and Begin Capital, with participation from Narwhal investments.

💥 Technical debt is one of the biggest blockers to enterprise innovation — consuming budgets, slowing teams down, and making large-scale modernisation risky, slow, and expensive.

🧠 AppFactor was built to change this. Its AI-augmented developer platform places software maintenance on autopilot, continuously analysing, modernising, and maintaining enterprise systems across code, architecture, infrastructure, and dependencies.

⚙️ With an agentic AI engine spanning documentation, technical debt analysis, test generation, and assisted refactoring — and a founding team with deep modernisation DNA — we believe AppFactor is uniquely positioned to redefine how enterprises manage technical debt at scale.

We’re proud to partner with Keith, Gabriel, Attila, and the entire AppFactor team as they help enterprises reclaim innovation capacity in the AI era.

👉 Learn more: https://lnkd.in/eYaS5Dqi

#EnterpriseSoftware #AI #TechnicalDebt #DevTools #DeepTech #B2B #AdaraVentures #venturecapital

✨ As 2025 comes to a close, we wanted to take a moment to reflect on an especially meaningful year at Adara Ventures. 

This year, we deepened our commitment to backing Europe’s most ambitious enterprise and deep-tech founders, expanded key partnerships to accelerate innovation across our portfolio, and celebrated many major milestones along the way.

To our founders, investors, and partners: thank you for your trust, collaboration, and continued support. We’re grateful to be on this journey with you and excited about what we’ll build together next. 🚀 

Wishing you a wonderful holiday season! 🌟

text:
🎉 We’re thrilled to back Acoru once again as part of their €10M Series A led by 33N Ventures to stop AI-driven fraud before it happens.

Acoru’s platform helps banks detect criminal intent early, preventing scams, money mules, and laundering before any transaction takes place. With deepfakes and voice cloning on the rise, their #AI-first approach couldn’t be more timely.

Founded by Pablo de la Riva Ferrezuelo and David Morán, Acoru has quickly built a world-class team tackling one of the most pressing challenges in financial #cybersecurity today.

At Adara Ventures, we’re proud to back visionary founders like Pablo and David who use deep technical expertise to make critical systems safer, smarter, and more resilient.

👉 Learn more about Acoru’s mission and this new funding round here: https://buff.ly/chon2PZ
